name: Stir-Fried Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Stir in the soybean paste and pepper, cooking for another 30 seconds.
4. Add the tomatoes and chilies, stirring briefly until heated through.
5. Stir in the spinach and cook, tossing frequently, until just wilted and vibrant green, about 3 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
